channel.title: Amazon on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Amazon on PepsFeeder

item.title: Wiretapping under the 46th Presidency
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: To rule is the exercise of control on the basis of knowledge Surveillance is one of the forces that enable social organization. The era of the information society is the age of over-penetrating bureaucracy, to such an extent that simply to participate in modern society is to be under electronic surveillance.

item.title: Amazon's Ring hacks reveal tech's security problem
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Whereas you form it they’re going to advance — nonetheless they won’t necessarily plot up two-enlighten authentication. The tool and devices which will seemingly be an increasing number of integral to our daily lives are continuously compromising our privacy and security.

item.title: Impulse Buying, Novelty Pets, and the Psychology of Modern Consumption
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Amazon Products You Never Knew You … or Anyone … Needed It’s not hyperbole to say that Amazon has completely changed the retail marketplace forever. The site has opened up retail to anyone with internet access.
